headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Norfolk Southern (NSC) After Its Strong Share Price Run
summary: If you are wondering whether Norfolk Southern's share price still offers value after a strong run, or if most of the upside is already reflected, this article walks through the key numbers so you can judge for yourself. The stock last closed at US$317.26, with returns of 0.4% over 7 days, 8.9% over 30 days, 10.2% year to date, 35.7% over 1 year and 57.8% over 3 years. These figures naturally raise questions about what is already priced in. Recent news around Norfolk Southern has kept...
